message:
Add /workflows page with Workflow Builder UI component

- Create /workflows route with tabs for "Build New" and "Curated"
- WorkflowBuilder: search prompts, drag-reorder, handoff notes
- Auto-saves work-in-progress to localStorage
- Export workflows as markdown to clipboard
- Add Workflows link to navigation

Closes bead jeffreysprompts.com-w48
